description: Alice schedules an early morning 30-minute video call with Frank and the Singapore team on Tuesday at 7 AM.

events.title: Singapore Team Sync
events.reasoning: Alice and Frank agreed to a 30-minute video call with the Singapore team on Tuesday at 7 AM.
events.assumptions: Singapore team members not listed by name; only Alice and Frank as local attendees. Video call link to be sent separately so no location captured.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: Singapore team sync on Tuesday at 7 AM for 30 minutes.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday), so 'Tuesday' resolves to 2026-02-24. Duration explicitly stated as 30 minutes.
